title: Webcast: Will ICC Arrest Warrants Against Netanyahu, Gallant End the Siege of Gaza?
description:
Join Helga Zepp-#LaRouche May 22, 11am Eastern/5pm CET in her Weekly Live dialogue and help usher in the Year of the New Paradigm for all Humanity. Send your questions, thoughts and reports to questions@schillerinstitue.com or ask them in the live stream.
